chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.76 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case. 1. For order on MA. 383/2025. 2. For order on office objections 3. For order on MA. 384/2025. 4. For hearing of bail application. 13.01.2025 Malik Sohail Raza, Advocate for applicant a/w applicant. == 1. Granted. 2 to 4 Applicant Mst. Parveen Bibi seeks protective bail in Crime No.51/2024 u/s 6,9, 3(c) CNS Act registered at P.S. Gulshan e Iqbal. Learned counsel submits that the applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in the present case; that applicant was not nominated in the FIR but subsequently she has been implicated in the case without any evidence; that the applicant is ready to approach concerned court however, apprehends her arrest, humiliation and disgrace at the hands of police, who is attempting raids at her house. Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for seven days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days from today or surrender of the applicant before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE AK
